issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: Remove {{LinkedList}} instances in favor of {{ArrayList}}.  {{ArrayList}} is generally more memory efficient, require less memory fragmentation, and with memory localization, faster to iterate.
